task_snapshots.title: 333d-05: Unit tests for role-based claiming and fair distribution
task_snapshots.description:
Add comprehensive tests in tests/unit/test_orchestrator.py for:
1. Role-filtered claiming — agent fails to claim task with mismatched role
2. Fair spawn allocation — orchestrator spawns for starving roles before full roles
3. Agent rebalancing — agents exit when role queue empties
4. Task ordering by starvation — group_by_role returns starving roles first

Target test coverage: 100% of new distribution logic.

[subtask of 15d83a329576]

**Completion signal**: All new tests pass; pytest test_orchestrator.py shows > 90% coverage on distribution functions.
